monitor_the_situation.title: American B-1 Bombers Head to Iran to Strike Missile Cities
— S4 · Conflict · Tehran, Iran · 2h ago. US B-1 bombers are en route to Iran for airstrikes on missile-related targets, the first such mission since the 40-day war.

US Strikes Iran for 10th Consecutive Night, Hits Bandar Abbas and Qeshm Island; Iran Attacks Kuwait and Jordan, Houthis Threaten Shipping in Bab el-Mandeb Strait, Targeting Saudi Arabia; US Central Co
— S3 · Conflict · Deir Jarir, West Bank, Palestine · 2h ago. Israeli settlers, reportedly with IDF present, raided Deir Jarir in the West Bank, killing two Palestinians and wounding a third.
Iranians Face Soaring Hardship Amid US War and Domestic Crises
— S3 · Humanitarian · Iran · 2h ago. Rising living costs, electricity cuts, and bombarded infrastructure deepen civilian suffering in Iran during ongoing conflict with the US.
